summary: Frozen HEAD 51773489 satisfies the runtime contract: gate_evidence and release_risk no longer receive implicit strict_head while content binding, dirty fingerprint, legacy merge-delta, provenance, lifecycle, and reasoned strict overrides remain intact.
inspection_summary: Reviewed all 16 changed files against origin/main, the Story, Architecture, Spec, policy resolution and binding order, content binding, role-specific regressions, Story E2E, generated review plan, and frozen-HEAD verification artifacts.
judgment_delta: Removing the built-in strict default does not weaken fail-closed binding because inspection inputs, missing and hash mismatch handling, and dirty fingerprint validation remain unchanged.
Rebase and merge reuse remains bounded by recorded gate and release surfaces, while changes to projection lineage, release impact, or reviewed files stale only affected roles.
Legacy reviews reach merge-delta reuse only without a content binding, and unresolved diffs, missing surfaces, or intersecting paths remain stale.
Role-policy and CLI strict_head overrides still require reasons and become stale on HEAD movement.
Dispatch authorization, closed lifecycle, inspection detail, and independent agent provenance remain separate pass conditions.
